zh.lifeSummary: 當William Yelverton於1590年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，他的父親Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet32歲，母親Dionysia Stubbes30歲。他於1614年6月12日與Ursula Richardson在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1640年6月19日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆享年50歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可盧加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Yelverton于1590年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，他的父亲Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet32岁，母亲Dionysia Stubbes30岁。他于1614年6月12日与Ursula Richardson在英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1640年6月19日在英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆享年50岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可盧加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Yelverton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from either of two places called Yelverton, in Norfolk or Devon. Medieval examples of the surname are from the Norfolk place, but the modern surname in Britain is associated mainly with Devon, where the earliest record of the surname is found in 1761, and is probably a substitution for Elford , an earlier form of the Devon placename. The Devon place, a hamlet in Buckland Monachorum, is not officially on record as Yelverton until the 19th century, when the Great Western Railway so named the station it built there in 1859. It is a dialect pronunciation of Elverton, which is first recorded in 1765 as an extended form of its medieval name Elford + -ton ‘town’. The Norfolk placename is recorded as Ailuertuna in 1086, and probably derives from the Old English personal name Æthelfrith or Geldfrith + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Elford
meanings: English: habitational name from Yelverton in Buckland Monachorum (Devon), recorded as Elleford in 1291 (see Yelverton ), named from the Old English personal name Ella or elle, ellen ‘elder tree’ + ford ‘ford’. The name may also derive from any of the places called Elford in Staffordshire and Northumberland, both probably from the Old English personal name Ella + ford.

variants.name: Yelvington
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Yelverton  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When William Yelverton was born in 1590, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet, was 32 and his mother, Dionysia Stubbes, was 30. He married Ursula Richardson on 12 June 1614, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 19 June 1640, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Rougham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Yelverton est né en 1590, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Dionysia Stubbes, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Ursula Richardson le 12 juin 1614, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 juin 1640, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Yelverton 1590 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet 32 und seine Mutter Dionysia Stubbes 30. Er hat am 12. Juni 1614 in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Ursula Richardson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Juni 1640 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Rougham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Yelverton è nato il nel 1590 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Dionysia Stubbes, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Ursula Richardson il 12 giugno 1614, nel Rougham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 giugno 1640, nel Rougham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Rougham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Yelvertonが1590年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronetは32歳，母Dionysia Stubbesは30歳であった。1614年6月12日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアムでUrsula Richardsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1640年6月19日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで50歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクロウアムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Yelverton(이)가 1590년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Dionysia Stubbes(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1614년 6월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에서 Ursula Richardson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1640년 6월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 루그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Yelverton nasceu em 1590, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Dionysia Stubbes, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Ursula Richardson em 12 de junho de 1614, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de junho de 1640, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Yelverton родился в 1590 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Dionysia Stubbes, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Ursula Richardson 12 июня 1614 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 июня 1640 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Yelverton nació en 1590, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Henry Yelverton Baronet, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Dionysia Stubbes, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Ursula Richardson el 12 de junio de 1614, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de junio de 1640, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
